ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the athlete */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the athlete's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., boxing, auto racing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory that this sport belongs to */,
  "ranking_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking system used in this sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sports_ranking_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_system_id") REFERENCES ranking_systems ("ranking_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sports_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES sports_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete being ranked */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport being ranked */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking was recorded */,
  "ranking_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking type */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date the ranking was recorded */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the athlete in the sport */,
  "previous_year_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_ranking_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_type_id") REFERENCES ranking_types ("ranking_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings" (
  "earnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete earning money */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport in which the athlete is earning money */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the earnings were recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the earnings */,
  "endorsements" REAL /* Endorsement earnings */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Prize money earnings */,
  "tax_deductions" REAL /* Tax deductions from the athlete's earnings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user logging in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of login */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date and time of logout */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's login location */,
  "login_device" TEXT /* Device used for login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date and time the query was made */,
  "query" TEXT /* Query string */,
  "query_result" TEXT /* Result of the query (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sports category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sports category (e.g., combat sports, motorsports) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sports category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sports subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the sports subcategory (e.g., boxing, auto racing) */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the sports subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category that this subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sports_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES sports_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_sports" (
  "athlete_sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete-sport entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete competing in the sport */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the athlete competes in */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete started competing in the sport */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete stopped competing in the sport (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_sports_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_sports_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_earnings" (
  "athlete_earnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete-earnings entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete earning money */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport in which the athlete is earning money */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the earnings were recorded */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the athlete in the sport for the year */,
  "tax_deductions" REAL /* Tax deductions from the athlete's earnings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_earnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_earnings_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_earnings_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking_types" (
  "ranking_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking type */,
  "ranking_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ranking type (e.g., current rank, previous year rank) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ranking type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking_systems" (
  "ranking_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking system */,
  "ranking_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the ranking system (e.g., ATP ranking, world ranking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ranking system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, data analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
